description: A designed graphic showing a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit and red tie speaking at a lectern with the presidential seal, a clear teleprompter panel beside him and a large American flag behind. Across the lower portion the text reads '11 STRAIGHT MONTHS WITH' and, in large letters with 'ZERO' in green, 'ZERO BORDER RELEASES'. A small White House wordmark sits at the bottom.
notable_text: 11 STRAIGHT MONTHS WITH ZERO BORDER RELEASES; The WHITE HOUSE
